title: Fix non-blocking assignments at end of always block

features.name: multiple NBA to same variable before and after task call with trailing #1 delay
features.description: Code should include an always block with multiple non-blocking assignments to the same variable separated by a task call, followed by a #1 delay at the end of the block

features.name: extra NBA after #1 delay at end of always block
features.description: Code should include an always block with multiple non-blocking assignments where the last assignment occurs after a #1 delay at the end of the block
